name: DnD

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Inner messages, you should pass them to DnD.update at your update function

aliases.name: Draggable
aliases.comment:
Type of Draggable object it could be Nothing or Just object
    It is parametrized by the type of meta information.
aliases.type: Maybe { meta : a, position : Position, atDroppable : Bool }

values.name: atDroppable
values.comment: Helper that allow you to check if draggable object over valid droppable area

values.name: draggable
values.comment: View wrapper for draggable object, you could drag object wraped by this helper
values.type: (Msg a -> m) -> a -> List (Attribute m) -> List (Html m) -> Html m

values.name: dragged
values.comment: View helper for draggable object, it drows html of dragged object under your mouse in process of drag
values.type: Draggable a -> (a -> Html m) -> Html m

values.name: droppable
values.comment:
View helper for droppable area, you could drop object to this area,
    after that your ondrop command will fire
values.type: (Msg a -> m) -> List (Attribute m) -> List (Html m) -> Html m

values.name: getMeta
values.comment: Helper that allow you to get meta information from draggable object

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscriptions alow you to get drop event
values.type: (a -> m) -> (Msg a -> m) -> Draggable a -> Sub m

values.name: update
values.comment: Update function handle all low level staff
values.type: Msg a -> Draggable a -> Draggable a
